column4: 2100|Deep Net — Access Point|neon_grid|You jack in. Reality dissolves into data streams. The digital world renders around you in wireframe.||||||

column3: 2101|Data Highway — West|neon_grid|A river of pure information flows past. Packets of data zip by like glowing fish.||||||
column4: 2102|Data Highway — Central|neon_grid|The main data artery. Traffic is heavy. Firewalls loom like fortress walls in the distance.||||||
column5: 2103|Data Highway — East|neon_grid|The highway branches. One path leads to corporate servers. The other to the dark net.||||||

column2: 2104|Abandoned Server — Lobby|neon_grid|A derelict virtual space. Corrupted textures and broken geometry. Someone lived here once.||||||
column3: 2105|Abandoned Server — Core|neon_grid|The server's processing core. Data ghosts flicker — echoes of deleted programs.||||||
column4: 2106|The Firewall — Exterior|neon_grid|A massive wall of code blocks the path. ICE programs patrol its surface like sharks.||||||
column5: 2107|The Firewall — Breach|neon_grid|A hole in the firewall. Someone punched through. The edges still spark with broken code.||||||
column6: 2108|Corporate Server — Outer|neon_grid|Beyond the firewall. Clean, sterile virtual architecture. Everything is monitored.||||||

column2: 2109|Dark Net — Entry|neon_grid|The other path. No rules here. The geometry is non-Euclidean. Viruses swim freely.||||||
column3: 2110|Dark Net — Market|neon_grid|A black market in cyberspace. Stolen data, illegal programs, digital weapons.|shop|||||
column4: 2111|Dark Net — Arena|neon_grid|A virtual combat arena. Programs fight to the death. Spectators bet in cryptocurrency.||||||
column5: 2112|Corporate Server — Vault|neon_grid|The data vault. Encrypted files worth billions. The security here is lethal.||||||
column6: 2113|Corporate Server — AI Chamber|neon_grid|The corporate AI's home. It manifests as a perfect geometric shape. It sees you.||||||

column3: 2114|Virus Nest|neon_grid|A corrupted zone where viruses breed. The code here is infectious. Don't stay long.||||||
column4: 2115|The Archive|neon_grid|A vast library of all human knowledge, digitized. Accessible to those who can find it.|safe|||||
column5: 2116|Ghost in the Machine|neon_grid|A sentient program that escaped deletion. It hides here, afraid and angry.||||||

column3: 2117|The Void — Digital|neon_grid|Where deleted data goes. Fragments of destroyed files drift like digital snow.||||||
column4: 2118|The Void — Core|neon_grid|The deepest layer. The original code of the network is visible here. The foundation of everything.||||||
column5: 2119|The Backdoor|neon_grid|A hidden exit point. It leads somewhere that shouldn't exist. A developer's secret.||||||
